ship_rules.description: All game logic modules must define data schemas for their domain entities before implementation.
ship_rules.enforcement: Smoke test validates that game modules include schema definitions.
ship_rules.rationale: Data-first design improves clarity, testability, and safer autonomous iteration.

ship_rules.description: The game must center on space transport logistics: hauling cargo between stations via route planning and ship management.
ship_rules.enforcement: Design document and core gameplay loops must reflect space transport theme.
ship_rules.rationale: This constraint preserves the core thesis through autonomous iterations.
